purpose: Densify the reproducibility/source-boundary supplement material with a render-heavy companion page while preserving the claim boundary between registered evidence panels and an AI-generated exposition slot.
claim_boundary: The AI-generated source-boundary gate is exposition only. Registered render, material, VLM target-view, and navigation panels carry the evidence-bearing content; the companion is not a new evidence source, experiment, metric, VLM run, or navigation run.

ai_generated_slot.rationale: The selected slot is abstract and schematic. It contains no readable author/path text and is used only inside a deterministic composition with explicit source-boundary labels.

standalone_figure.rationale: The final deterministic composition uses the AI gate plus registered packet, render, material, VLM, navigation, route, and paired target-view panels. The third iteration removed title overlap, added real render closeups, and no visible clipping or caption separation remained in the standalone image.

rendered_pdf_pages.rationale: The reproducibility prose now fills both columns before the companion page; the earlier single-column whitespace caused by an immediate float flush is removed.
The companion appears as an independent full-width figure page before references. Caption remains attached below the image, and no reference text or following section intrudes into the figure page.
References start after the companion page in normal text flow, avoiding the earlier figure-and-bibliography mix.

positive_patterns_present: AI-generated source-boundary gate schematic used only for exposition
not a new evidence source, experiment, metric, VLM run, or navigation run
negative_patterns_absent: Red material in these diagnostic cases

iteration_notes: Iteration 1 placed a column-width companion in the two-column reproducibility text; visual review rejected it because the image and caption split across columns.
Iteration 2 moved the companion to a full-width float; visual review rejected the reference-page mixing and excess whitespace.
Iteration 3 added a registered render source tray and paired target-view closeups, then placed the figure after reproducibility text and before bibliography.
